taskPreset.title: Create Goal Task
taskPreset.description: Queue a sustained-work goal task with repository scope and compatible hero filtering.

panel.projectHint: The goal task will be created in the selected project.
panel.taskNameHint: Optional. Leave empty to let the title be optimized from the goal description.
panel.taskNamePlaceholder: Drive the preset-task compatibility rollout to completion
panel.repositoryAccessHint: Optionally select writable and read-only repositories that define the sustained-work boundary.
panel.repositoryAccessEmpty: No repositories are available for the selected project yet.
panel.commandHint: The bundled goal preset always dispatches through `/goal`.
panel.goalHint: Describe the sustained-work objective, expected outcome, and any critical constraints.
panel.goalPlaceholder: Implement preset-agent compatibility end to end, keep the task list current, and avoid interactive clarification.

goal.description: Use the bundled `/goal` sustained-work command surface.
